---
title: "Spaceship Titanic Cataboost"
author: "Hazem Masarani & Lam"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



# Load packages
```{r}

if (!requireNamespace("tidyverse")) install.packages('tidyverse')
if (!requireNamespace("caret")) install.packages('caret')
if (!requireNamespace("leaps")) install.packages('leaps')
if (!requireNamespace("bestglm")) install.packages('bestglm')
if (!requireNamespace("MASS")) install.packages('MASS')
if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2")) install.packages('ggplot2')
if (!requireNamespace("gridExtra")) install.packages('gridExtra')
if (!requireNamespace("dplyr"))install.packages("dplyr")
if (!requireNamespace("rpart"))install.packages("rpart")
if (!requireNamespace("reshape2"))install.packages("reshape2")
if(!require(devtools)) install.packages("devtools")

library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(leaps)
library(bestglm)
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)
library(rpart)
library(reshape2)
devtools::install_github('catboost/catboost', subdir = 'catboost/R-package')
```

# load files
```{r}
data <- read_csv("../data/preprocessed_data.csv")
test <- read_csv("../data/preprocessed_test.csv")
head(data)
head(test)
```
## Show columns
```{r}
colnames(data)
```


## Selected Columns
```{r}
selected_columns <- c("CryoSleep", "Age", "VIP", "RoomService", "FoodCourt", "ShoppingMall", "Spa", "VRDeck", "Cabin_num", "Side", "CabinMidFlag", "HomePlanetEarth", "HomePlanetEuropa", "HomePlanetMars", "Destination55 Cancri e", "DestinationPSO J318.5-22", "DestinationTRAPPIST-1e", "Group1", "Group2", "Group3", "Group4", "Group5", "Group6", "Group7", "DeckA", "DeckB", "DeckC", "DeckD", "DeckE", "DeckF", "DeckG", "FamilyMembersCabinCount", "total_spending")

```

## Target Column
```{r}
target_column <- c("Transported")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
k <- 5
folds <- createFolds(data$Transported, k = k, list = TRUE, returnTrain = FALSE)
```

```{r}
results <- data.frame(Fold = integer(),
                      Accuracy = numeric(),
                      Sensitivity = numeric(),
                      Specificity = numeric(),
                      Kappa = numeric(),
                      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for(i in 1:k) {
  
  test_idx <- folds[[i]]
  train_idx <- setdiff(1:nrow(data), test_idx)
  
  train_pool <- catboost.load_pool(data = data[train_idx, selected_columns],
                                   label = data$Transported[train_idx],
                                   cat_features = which(colnames(data[selected_columns]) %in% cat_features))
  
  test_pool <- catboost.load_pool(data = data[test_idx, selected_columns],
                                  label = data$Transported[test_idx],
                                  cat_features = which(colnames(data[selected_columns]) %in% cat_features))
  
  params <- list(
    iterations = 1000,
    depth = 6,
    learning_rate = 0.05,
    loss_function = 'Logloss',
    eval_metric = 'Accuracy',
    random_seed = 123,
    od_type = 'Iter',
    od_wait = 50
  )
  
  model <- catboost.train(learn_pool = train_pool,
                          test_pool = test_pool,
                          params = params)
  
  preds <- catboost.predict(model, test_pool, prediction_type = 'Class')
  
  cm <- confusionMatrix(factor(preds), factor(data$Transported[test_idx]))
  
  results <- rbind(results, data.frame(Fold = i,
                                       Accuracy = cm$overall['Accuracy'],
                                       Sensitivity = cm$byClass['Sensitivity'],
                                       Specificity = cm$byClass['Specificity'],
                                       Kappa = cm$overall['Kappa']))
}

results
apply(results[, -1], 2, mean)  # average metrics across folds
```
